solution.name: How to reset your VPN device password
solution.description:
Step 1: Open the VPN portal

Navigate to vpn.acme.example/portal and sign in with your SSO credentials.

Step 2: Generate a new device password

Click the Generate device password button on the portal home page. The new password will appear on screen — copy it immediately, it won't be shown again.

Step 3: Update your client

In Cisco AnyConnect:

  1. Open Preferences → Authentication
  2. Paste the new device password
  3. Click Save
  4. Reconnect

If it still fails

Check System Settings → Privacy & Security → Profiles for an MDM profile named Acme MDM v2. If it's missing, raise an incident referencing this article — the IT team will push the device certificate.
